activation_sequence: Rerun Phase 6.3 immediately before the live batch.
Send and verify one external alert test.
Confirm Binance spot account balances and no unexpected open orders.
Generate the final live batch from the latest BTC/ETH-only signal.
Cap the batch to 1 order(s) and 50 USDT total notional.
Only after final operator go, arm the one-batch live runner.
Submit one supervised batch only, then immediately disarm live trading.

checklist.title: Batch notional is inside gross risk limit

checklist.details: LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED must stay false while this is only a plan.
checklist.title: Live trading remains disabled before final go

checklist.details: GLOBAL_KILL_SWITCH must stay true until the explicit activation step.
checklist.title: Global kill switch remains enabled before final go

checklist.details: External alerts are required for any live batch.
checklist.title: External alert channel remains configured

checklist.details: Real exchange credentials must stay in Hummingbot connector config.
checklist.title: Exchange keys are not stored in quant-system env

checklist.details: Final operator go has been recorded.
checklist.title: Final operator go/no-go

post_batch_sequence: Export Hummingbot events and exchange fills.
Run daily report, reconciliation, and tax/trade export.
Compare Hummingbot fills against Binance fills and balances.
Document PnL, fees, slippage, alerts, and any manual intervention.
rollback_sequence: Stop the Hummingbot container or script immediately.
Cancel any open orders in Hummingbot and confirm in the Binance spot UI.
Do not restart live trading before reconciliation is complete.
